options.1: 🚀 **Launch Full System:** Boots all 41 agents in Standard Mode (ws_1).
options.3: 📁 **New Project Workspace:** Create a new WS, set a mission, and auto-assign agents.
options.4: 🎨 **Front-End Development:** Start the 'OpenJarvis UI' project to move away from Slack.

!wait.description: Immediate pause of the active pipeline. Agents wait for Kevin's input.

!resume.description: Resume work after a !wait pause, integrating Kevin's latest feedback.

!status.description: Show Hardware (VRAM/RAM) and Agent Health status.

!tools.description: List all AI-generated qtools and system commands.
